fields.conditions: Acquire the Golden Scale (or Iron Boots)
fields.how: Heart Piece #25: Northwest of Lon Lon Ranch, between Gerudo Valley and Hyrule Castle, there is a tree. Once you walk by it the Shard of Agony will chime, or if you are playing the N64 version, the Stone of Agony will shake. Place a Bomb next to it to reveal a hole. Inside, use either the Iron Boots or the Golden Scale to dive deep into the water and retrieve this Piece of Heart.

Heart Piece #26: As a child, plant a Magic Bean in the soft soil at the entrance of Dodongo's Cavern. When you return as an adult, you can ride the Magic Bean Plant to jump on to the ledge just above Dodongo's Cavern where a Piece of Heart awaits. Another way to get there is to go to the Bomb Flower that is directly above Dodongo's Cavern. Move the Bomb Flower out of the way, then face away towards the southeast (opposite the cavern), target and backflip. If done right, you will land on the platform and can get the Piece of Heart early.

fields.conditions: Learn the Bolero of Fire, plant a Magic Bean
fields.how: Heart Piece #27: As a child, warp to Death Mountain Crater and plant a Magic Bean in the soft soil next to the Triforce Pedestal. Warp back as an adult and ride the Magic Bean up to one of the two smoky mountains in the center of the area, which has a Piece of Heart atop it.

Heart Piece #28: When you return to Zora's Domain as an adult, Lord Jabu-Jabu is no longer here and there are now a bunch of icebergs floating around. Jump across them to find a Piece of Heart atop one of them.

Heart Piece #29: In the far right room of the Ice Cavern, which is the same room where you can acquire some Blue Fire and find the Compass, there are lots of stalactites that fall from the ceiling. There are a few patches of Red Ice and within one of them is a Piece of Heart. Use Blue Fire to melt it.
Heart Piece #30: Located at the very bottom of Zora's Fountain. Use the Iron Boots to reach the ground floor and collect the heart piece.

Heart Piece #31: At Zora's River as a child, near the center of the map, step on the nearby log that sticks out into the water. Pull out your Ocarina to get five Frogs to appear. Play the Song of Storms and you'll be rewarded with a Piece of Heart.

fields.conditions: Learn Epona's Song, Sun's Song, Song of Storms (Child)
fields.how: Heart Piece #32: At Zora's River as a child, when you meet the five frogs, play Zelda's Lullaby, Saria's Song, Epona's Song, Sun's Song, and the Song of Time. Each time one of the frogs will grow in size. Once all five frogs have grown into the Fabulous Five Froggish Tenors, and you have also played the Song of Storms to get the other heart piece, you can play a game of Simon Says. You will have to quickly press the right button, depending on where the butterfly appears over the frog's head. The pattern is as follows. Nintendo 3DS Version – L, X, Y, R, X, Y, R, L, R, L, R, Y, X, L Nintendo 64 Version – A, C-left, C-right, C-down, C-left, C-right, C-down, A, C-down, A, C-down, C-right, C-left, A

Heart Piece #33: The Treasure Chest Shop is open only at night. Enter and you can play this game for 10 Rupees a try. In each room, you are given a choice between two chests, one being a prize while the other allows you to move forward to better prizes. Each decision is a fifty-fifty chance, so your chances of getting all the way through aren't that good. Once you have acquired the Lens of Truth, you can use it during the game in order to see what is inside the chests. Pick all the Small Key chests to get to the end.

Heart Piece #34: At the very top of the fortress is a large treasure chest. One of the doors to the south takes you to an upper ledge where you can walk around and climb up some vines to get to the highest point. Run over to the north and at the gap, you can play the Scarecrow's Song to make Pierre appear. Use the Hookshot to get across and open the chest for a Piece of Heart. If you have the Longshot, you should just barely be able to grapple on to the chest itself.

Heart Piece #35: Once you have saved all the carpenters and acquired the Gerudo Token, you can bring Epona to the far east and play the Horseback Archery game. If you can manage to get over 1,000 points, you will be rewarded with a Piece of Heart.

fields.conditions: Learn the Requiem of Spirit, plant a Magic Bean
fields.how: Heart Piece #36: Next to the entrance of the Spirit Temple is a soft soil location. Plant a Magic Bean as a child (you can warp there using the Requiem of Spirit), and then come back as an adult and ride it. Near the end of its travels, it will go over the Stonehenge-looking platform where there is a Piece of Heart. Jump off and collect the final one in the game!
